payload.text: build exactly this website. add all animations and build the inner pages

**Envisioning the React App**

I'm starting to visualize the React application based on the "Sora Sushi" website. The dark, high-end theme is key, aiming for a sophisticated feel. I see a prominent hero section with a compelling sushi bowl image. I'm focusing on the navigation bar's design to replicate its elegance.


**Defining the Application Structure**

I'm now solidifying the application's skeletal structure. I'm focusing on key components: the Navbar, Footer, and core pages (Home, Menu, About, and OurSpace). I'm planning smooth animations with `framer-motion`, icon integration using `lucide-react`, and styling with `Tailwind CSS`. Also, I'm integrating the `Gemini API` for a unique feature and using `React Router`.

entries.description: Application metadata including name, description and required permissions.
Main HTML entry point with Tailwind CSS and Google Fonts.
Main application component with routing and global layout.
Main landing page component replicating the provided design.

Reserve now View menu
{/* Right Sidebar Cards */}
{/* Menu Card */}

Menu

 {/* Reservation/Wine Card */}

Reservation

 {/* Our Space Card */}

Our Space
); }; export default Home;
